passives.name: Shield Reaver
passives.effects: Dealing damage to an enemy champion inflicts them with venom for 3 seconds, reducing any {{tip|shield|shields}} they gain within the duration by {{rd|50%|35%}}, and if the target was not already afflicted by the venom, reducing all of their active shields by the same amount.

effects_structured.raw: Dealing damage to an enemy champion applies Venom for 3 seconds.
While Venom is active, shields gained are reduced by 50% (35% for ranged).
If the target was not already Venomed, reduce all active shields by the same amount.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: dealing damage to an enemy champion applies a 3-second Venom debuff that reduces subsequent shields gained during the debuff window.
Player-visible behavior: on first Venom application (target not already affected), currently active shields are immediately reduced by the same melee/ranged amounts (50% melee, 35% ranged).

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset

sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror

sources.name: League Wiki (Serpent's Fang)
sources.used_for: page-level verification of Venom duration, melee/ranged shield-reduction splits, and first-application active-shield reduction behavior
